page_metadata.biotools__summary: PharMD is a tool to retrieve pharmacophore models from MD trajectories of protein-ligand complexes, identification of redundant pharmacophores and virtual screening with multiple pharmacophore models using different scoring schemes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PharMD is a tool to retrieve pharmacophore models from MD trajectories of protein-ligand complexes, identification of redundant pharmacophores and virtual screening with multiple pharmacophore models using different scoring schemes.
